scripts.build: npm run -w frontend build && npm run -w backend build
scripts.show: tmux new-session -s stagelinq 'caffeinate -disu bash -c "while true; do npm start; sleep 2; done"'
scripts.fresh: npm install && npm run build && tmux new-session -s stagelinq 'caffeinate -disu bash -c "while true; do npm start; sleep 2; done"'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && pm2 restart stagelinq-webview --update-env && pm2 logs stagelinq-webview
scripts.pm2-clean: npm run build && node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('pm2 delete all',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){}" && pm2 start backend/dist/index.js --name stagelinq-webview && pm2 save && pm2 logs stagelinq-webview
